reviews.author: POOJA dafle
reviews.review_body:
After 4 years of attending the school, we changed our sons school due to a few reasons here,
1.)Some of the teachers in each year- are ill equipped, cannot speak basic English.
2.) the school makes everything about itself and is not student oriented.
3.) teachers are very rude sometimes when you want to convey something it is unacceptable and they give plenty of reasons.
4.) I would particularly name a teacher : class 1-b Neha…. Cannot speak proper English, is extremely judgemental frames kids for minor mistakes instead of counselling she shames kids and parents. Please learn some basic English if you are employed in an English institution.
5.) the concepts aren’t cleared but mugging up is a practice followed by them. As few teachers are really bad at what they do .

reviews.author: Om khonde
reviews.review_body: the worstest school I have ever seen in my life

reviews.review_body: Washroom is literally the worst and teachers are not even qualified

reviews.author: Progressive Services
reviews.review_body:
Very rude , my kid's leg was fractured , he wanted to give his exam on ground floor , they didnt allowed him to give the exam.

Shame on you school😠
Worst experience ever

reviews.author: Vishant Chauhan
reviews.review_body: Staff is lethargic and not willing to entertain even for admission and what to expect when child already got the admission

reviews.review_body: Very bad cultural function things and they don't know how to teach

reviews.review_body: Activity based learning helps students to retain the learnings.

reviews.review_body: Many students have won at the school, State and National level sports Competitions. Great!

reviews.review_body: The studies at Vedansh help students with concept clarity and application of concepts.

reviews.review_body: The school ensures 100% participation of students in all activities which is appreciable
